_comment: Remote content-type catalog. Publish-only source (NOT bundled into the app). The daily content sync fetches a SIGNED build of this from the release tag 'content-catalog-latest' and registers any type whose key the app doesn't already ship — so a brand-new tab can appear without an app update. Baked types (yoga, exercises) need not be listed; they ship in the build. Build with: node scripts/build-content.mjs build-catalog.

types.label: Meditation
types.description: Short guided breathing and meditation sessions.
